title: Moderation Actions - Abuse Queue Cleared
body:
The abuse queue has been reviewed and all 6 reports resolved:

Bans Issued (2):
• spam_wave_42 - Phishing links across multiple channels
• toxic_runner - Repeated targeted harassment of newcomers

Warnings Issued (2):
• new_member_17 - Off-topic posting (educational)
• bot_like_user_77 - Suspicious automation patterns

No Action (2):
• trusted_helper - Trusted member, moderation dispute context
• core_maintainer - False positive from brigading

Trusted members were correctly protected per policy. Queue cleared.
